title: silene ciliata subsp. ciliata
intro: Silene ciliata subsp. ciliata, also known as downy catchfly, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, thanks to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Silene ciliata subsp. ciliata often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal potential.
